mapper.select: SELECT cr.* , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS approvalUser , COALESCE(cr.PRODUCT_NO, '') AS productCd FROM ITN_CR cr LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping ON cr.CR_NO = mapping.OBJECT_ID LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL detail ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = detail.REQUEST_NO AND detail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' WHERE CR_NO = #{crNo}
